name: Firewall Changes
description: Detects Windows Firewall rule additions, modifications, deletions, profile changes, and policy overrides. Attackers frequently add firewall rules to allow C2 traffic or disable the firewall entirely. Event 2033 (all rules deleted) is a critical indicator.
author: EventHawk (SANS/Microsoft/Sigma)

event_descriptions.2002: Windows Firewall setting changed — Profile, Setting, NewValue
event_descriptions.2004: Rule added to Windows Firewall exception list — RuleName, ApplicationPath, Service, Direction, Protocol, LocalPorts
event_descriptions.2005: Rule modified in Windows Firewall exception list
event_descriptions.2006: Rule deleted from Windows Firewall exception list
event_descriptions.2009: Windows Firewall could not load group policy rule
event_descriptions.2033: ALL RULES DELETED from a firewall store — critical: complete firewall policy wipe
event_descriptions.4946: Rule added to Windows Firewall exception list
event_descriptions.4947: Rule modified in Windows Firewall exception list — ModifyingUser, RuleId, RuleName
event_descriptions.4948: Rule deleted from Windows Firewall exception list
event_descriptions.4951: Rule ignored by Windows Firewall (version mismatch)
event_descriptions.4954: Windows Firewall Group Policy settings changed — policy push may override local rules
event_descriptions.4957: Windows Firewall did not apply rule
event_descriptions.4958: Windows Firewall did not apply rule (dependency not found)
